title: ODS Score Output v1
description: Output of `ods score --json`: the technical-debt impact of a change, combining AI detection, quality analysis, test coverage, and duplication signals.

pr_number.description: Pull request number, when known. Omitted otherwise.

technical_debt_delta.description: Weighted technical-debt impact. Higher positive = more debt added; negative = debt reduced.

verdict.description: Overall direction of the debt delta.

recommendation.description: Human-readable guidance derived from the verdict.

files_analyzed.description: Number of files included in the score.

Breakdown.description: The dimensional scores that combine into technical_debt_delta.

critical_issues.description: Count of critical + high severity issues.

test_coverage.description: Line coverage rate (0.0–1.0). -1 means not measured.

test_coverage_source.description: How test_coverage was obtained. 'unknown' means it was not measured.

duplication_rate.description: Estimated fraction of duplicated code in the change.
